---
name: Security report (public-safe)
about: Report a potential security concern without exposing sensitive details
title: "[Security] "
labels: [security]
assignees: []
---

## Important

Do not include secrets, credentials, or exploit details in public issues.

If this is a sensitive vulnerability, follow the private reporting process in SECURITY.md.

## High-Level Description

Provide a non-sensitive summary of the concern.

## Affected Area

- [ ] GitHub Actions pipeline
- [ ] Azure DevOps pipeline
- [ ] Repository configuration
- [ ] Documentation

## Potential Impact

Describe potential impact at a high level.

## Recommended Next Step

Indicate whether maintainers should move this report to private channels.
